fields.why_volunteer: I want to help people and gain experience.

fields.name: UNICEF
fields.title: Global Aid Organization
fields.about: UNICEF works in over 190 countries and territories to save children's lives, to defend their rights, and to help them fulfill their potential, from early childhood through adolescence. We work tirelessly to reach the world's most vulnerable and marginalized children.

fields.name: INTERSOS
fields.title: Humanitarian Aid Organization
fields.about: INTERSOS provides urgent humanitarian assistance, including healthcare support, protection services, and essential aid for displaced individuals and vulnerable communities. We work tirelessly to reach the world's most vulnerable populations affected by conflict and disaster.

fields.name: World Food Programme
fields.title: Global Humanitarian Organization
fields.about: World Food Programme provides essential food assistance and works to prevent malnutrition, supporting vulnerable groups to ensure fair and reliable access to nutrition. We strive to build a world with zero hunger.

fields.name: UNHCR
fields.title: The UN Refugee Agency
fields.about: UNHCR works to protect refugees and displaced individuals by providing legal support, temporary shelter, essential services, and assistance in asylum and resettlement processes. We strive to save lives and build better futures for millions forced from home.

fields.name: World Health Organization
fields.title: Global Health Agency
fields.about: World Health Organization provides urgent health guidance, emergency medical support, preventive programs, and field assistance to healthcare systems during crises and disease outbreaks.

fields.name: Red Crescent
fields.title: Humanitarian Organization
fields.about: Red Crescent provides urgent medical and humanitarian assistance, including emergency healthcare, food distribution, psychological support, and rapid disaster response for affected communities. We are dedicated to alleviating human suffering, protecting life and health, and upholding human dignity, especially during armed conflicts and other emergencies.

fields.name: Child Protection
fields.description: Providing a safe environment and legal support for children in danger zones.

fields.description: Supporting schools, training teachers, and providing essential educational supplies.

fields.name: Water and Sanitation
fields.description: Drilling wells and ensuring access to clean, drinkable water for communities.

fields.description: Providing secure environments and legal protection for those in danger zones.

fields.name: Assistance for children and vulnerable groups

fields.name: Food Assistance
